title: luzula campestris subsp. multiflora
intro: Luzula campestris subsp. multiflora, also known as the many-flowered woodrush, is a subspecies of the Luzula campestris plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Juncaceae). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its rhizomes, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Luzula campestris subsp. multiflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, act as an antibacterial agent, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
